title: kalanchoe velutina subsp. dangeardii
intro: Kalanchoe velutina subsp. dangeardii is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family, native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of anthraquinones and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems, sore throats, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits. Kalanchoe velutina subsp. dangeardii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to treat the mentioned conditions or as a natural remedy for fever reduction.
